blended.narrative: Mont Sutton is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 49°F.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
